ab: Ma-aq is malhaqu ki qamutis a asa tu makusia haquqatu ta, ma-aq is malhaqu ki tikulas a asa tu makusia haqumusqut ta. mopa ta mamantuk.
ch: A:老鼠應該要⽤⽯壓式陷阱抓，⽵雞應該要⽤套頸式陷阱抓，這樣才對。
en: It is correct to catch mice through rangay and catch bamboo partridges through qjiulang.

ab: Mopa ta qan a dau, paaq pu-un ni-i saak udamu-an i muliva naak a sinpalhaqu ka.
ch: B:原來是這樣，我都搞錯了！難怪我都抓不到。
en: No wonder! I am mistaken and that’s why I cannot catch any of them.

ab: Na masnava ang saak su-u tu na piko-uq a sia dii dusa haqu kun is malhaqu.
ch: A:那我再教你怎麼製作這兩種陷阱。
en: Then I will teach you how to set up these two traps.

ab: Uu, tuza tu unin su-u, na madia naak tesaq is qabas in.
ch: B:好啊！太棒了！這樣我以後就會抓到獵物了。
en: Great! I will be able to catch the prey in the future.

ab: Masmuav madaqvasdengaz in a ismuut haan quma ta, mundipa-a siza kaul haan patqemangsutan ta, na munhaan ta quma ta mavalval i ismuut.
ch: A:田裡的草太長了，你去倉庫拿鐮刀，我們去田裡。
en: The grass in the fields is too tall. Go to the warehouse to take the sickle and let’s go to the fields.

ab: I-isaq a kaul a?
ch: B:鐮刀放在哪裡?
en: Where are the sickles?

ab: Isisila haan kalala ta, usadu-an is munkunbu in patqemangsutan ta.
ch: A:在簍子的旁邊，你進去倉庫就會看到了。
en: It is next to the round basket. You will see it when you enter the warehouse.

ab: Asa tu Mananulu kis ankus i kaul i, manusqitdengaz a kaul a, ka-a tu siszaqan.
ch: A:小心拿，不要受傷。鐮刀很利。
en: Be careful and don’t get hurt. The sickle is very sharp.

ab: Ka-a tu kadapan inaak sinpalhaqu ka!
ch: A:不要踩到我的陷阱!
en: Don’t step on my trap!

ab: I-isaq su-u ka sinpalhaqu ka?
ch: B:你的陷阱在哪裡?
en: Where is your trap?

ab: Ihaan lukis nastu ta naak a sinpalhaqu ka.
ch: A:我的陷阱在那棵樹的下面。
en: My trap is under that tree.

ab: Mavia asu tu maqansiap ang tu?
ch: B:你怎麼會記得?
en: How do you remember?

ab: Heza naak i-iti ka sinpasqaal a, paaq pu-un maqansiap ang saak tu i-isaq naak a sinpalhaqu ka.
ch: A:我在這邊有做記號，我知道我的陷阱在哪裡。
en: I make a mark here, so I know where my trap is.

ab: Ma-aq dii kalala kun a tupa-un tu mat-iskaan, pihanun zami vanglaz ta patala ki iskaan.
ch: A:這是魚筌，我們放在溪邊捕魚。
en: This is a fish trap which we put beside the river for fishing.

ab: Uka naam iti mat-iskaan tu kalala, makusia saam ispalalaskan is malaskan.
ch: B:我們那邊沒有魚筌，我們都用釣竿抓魚。
en: We don’t have any fish traps there, so we catch fish with a fishing rod.

ab: Ni-i saak mekusia ispalalaskan a, duuq maqtu ang pasnava zaku kis muqnin?
ch: A:我沒有用過釣竿，你下次教我好嗎?
en: I have never used a fishing rod before, would you mind teaching me next time?

ab: Na maqtu! taskun ata malaskan is muqna in.
ch: B:好啊!我們下次一起去釣魚。
en: Sure! Let’s go fishing together next time.

ab: Na zaku ka masnava su-u matas-i ki mat-iskaan tu kalala ka.
ch: A:那我下次教你做魚筌。
en: I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

ab: Hia! Bizakbizak in su-u ka ispalalaskan a, duuq heza iskaan ma-un! kavava-i silulu.
ch: A:你的釣竿動了，是不是有魚上鉤了!你快拉起來。
en: Your fishing rod is moving. Isn’t the fish on the hook? Pull it up!

ab: Mal-u-ang i, masmuav in a qatu tu vialvialdengaz a, i-iti saak silulu ispalalaskan tu duun a, mundipa-a asu siza saluzu ta.
ch: B:等等，船太晃了。我在這邊拉釣竿，你去那邊幫我拿網子來。
en: Wait, the ship is rolling heavily. I am here to pull the fishing rod and you should go there to grab me the net.

ab: Silulu-av ang a iskaan mapunzaku-an, na zaku in a mindangaz su-u silulu.
ch: A:你把魚拉到我這邊。我幫妳拉起來。
en: Pull the fish to my side and I will help you pull it up.

ab: Tuza tu manahipdengaz a is-aang ai madia mita tesaq, matmuz amin a is-olading i iskaan tu kalala kun.
ch: A:太好了!今天大豐收，魚簍都裝滿了。
en: Great! It is a bumper crop today with full fish baskets.

ab: Ina, kavava-a ata musuqis munlumaq i, na ispasiqtu ki mita duma.
ch: B:我們快回去和大家分享。
en: Let’s go back immediately and share it with everyone.
